query: Lyapunov function neural network training convergence certificate 2025

results.title: The Lyapunov Neural Network: Adaptive Stability Certification (Richards 2018)
Certified Set Convergence for Piecewise Affine Systems via Neural Lyapunov Functions (arXiv 2604.00286)

scan_notes: Existing literature focuses on Lyapunov functions for control/dynamical systems and as constraints on neural network policies. Sparser coverage for using Lyapunov certificates as per-layer fine-tuning step-size adaptation in LLM training. Need to verify in step 06.
